```python
import pytest


from your_module import trie_insert_search


def test_insert_and_search_single_word():
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()

    insert("cat")

    assert search("cat") is True
    assert search("ca") is False
    assert search("cats") is False


def test_insert_and_search_multiple_words_with_shared_prefix():
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()

    insert("car")
    insert("cart")
    insert("cat")

    assert search("car") is True
    assert search("cart") is True
    assert search("cat") is True
    assert search("ca") is False
    assert search("can") is False


def test_search_before_any_insert_returns_false():
    _, search = trie_insert_search()

    assert search("anything") is False
    assert search("") is False


def test_insert_empty_string_and_search_it():
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()

    insert("")

    assert search("") is True
    assert search("a") is False


def test_insert_empty_string_does_not_affect_other_words():
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()

    insert("")
    insert("a")

    assert search("") is True
    assert search("a") is True
    assert search("aa") is False


def test_duplicate_insert_is_idempotent():
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()

    insert("dog")
    insert("dog")

    assert search("dog") is True
    assert search("do") is False


def test_case_sensitive_search():
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()

    insert("Cat")

    assert search("Cat") is True
    assert search("cat") is False
    assert search("CAT") is False


def test_non_alphabetic_characters():
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()

    insert("a-b")
    insert("x1")
    insert("hello world")

    assert search("a-b") is True
    assert search("x1") is True
    assert search("hello world") is True
    assert search("hello") is False


def test_unicode_characters():
    insert, search = trie_insert_search()

    insert("café")
    insert("你好")

    assert search("café") is True
    assert search("你好") is True
    assert search("caf") is False
    assert search("你") is False


def test_separate_instances_do_not_share_state():
    insert1, search1 = trie_insert_search()
    insert2, search2 = trie_insert_search()

    insert1("apple")

    assert search1("apple") is True
    assert search2("apple") is False


def test_insert_none_raises_type_error():
    insert, _ = trie_insert_search()

    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        insert(None)


def test_search_none_raises_type_error():
    _, search = trie_insert_search()

    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        search(None)


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "value",
    [123, 12.5, True, ["a"], {"a": 1}],
)
def test_insert_non_iterable_or_invalid_types_raise_type_error(value):
    insert, _ = trie_insert_search()

    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        insert(value)


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "value",
    [123, 12.5, True, ["a"], {"a": 1}],
)
def test_search_non_iterable_or_invalid_types_raise_type_error(value):
    _, search = trie_insert_search()

    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        search(value)
```
